title: 19 exact duplicate resource titles in the catalog
fix: submit pipeline now rejects exact duplicate titles (case-insensitive, live statuses) with 409 duplicate_title and an actionable message; duplicate-URL 409 unchanged

scripts/run19-retitle-dup-titles.ts retitles existing duplicates via the live admin API: keeper = most-official host, others get a host disambiguator e.g. 'Plyr (GitHub)'; dynamic per-environment, idempotent
retitle chosen over delete: hard-deleting dup rows silently cascades journey steps/bookmarks (run15 lesson)

evidence.devDataFix: 12 duplicate-title groups found and retitled (dev; audit saw 19 on then-stale prod); second run: 0 groups; DB check: 0 duplicate approved titles

prodFollowUp: run scripts/run19-retitle-dup-titles.ts against prod after republish (recomputes prod's own duplicate set)
